  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Quantity Surveyor",
  "description": "Fort Hermon Limited is a dynamic&nbsp;&nbsp;engineering and&nbsp;&nbsp;construction company specializing in delivering high-quality infrastructure, building, and industrial projects. With a focus on innovation, safety, and technical excellence, we provide end-to-end solutions that meet global standards and exceed client expectations&nbsp;

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quantity Surveyor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

General Responsibilities
Quantity Surveying Duties:


	Prepare and review Bills of Quantities (BOQ), material schedules, and cost estimates.
	Measure and value construction works from drawings and site records.
	Assist in preparing project budgets, cost plans, and cash flow forecasts.
	Monitor project costs and identify cost-saving opportunities.
	Prepare interim valuations, variation orders, and final accounts.
	Verify subcontractor and supplier invoices before payment processing.
	Conduct site visits to monitor project progress and verify quantities executed.
	Maintain accurate records of project costs and contractual documentation.


Procurement Duties:


	Source and evaluate suppliers, vendors, and subcontractors.
	Obtain and analyze quotations to ensure competitive pricing and quality.
	Prepare purchase requisitions, purchase orders, and procurement reports.
	Negotiate pricing, delivery schedules, and payment terms with suppliers.
	Track material deliveries and ensure timely supply to project sites.
	Maintain supplier databases and procurement records.
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment of materials.
	Ensure procurement activities comply with company policies and project requirements.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Inetersted and qualified candidates should send their CV to: vineonyido@gmail.com using the suject &quot;QS Officer&quot; as the subject of the mail.

Note: Please note it is mandatory to have a procurement experience to enable you be considered for this role.",

Quantity Surveyor Job at Fort Hermon Limited




        
    

        
        Fort Hermon Limited is a dynamic  engineering and  construction company specializing in delivering high-quality infrastructure, building, and industrial projects. With a focus on innovation, safety, and technical excellence, we provide end-to-end solutions that meet global standards and exceed client expectations 

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Quantity Surveyor

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

General Responsibilities
Quantity Surveying Duties:
     

            
    




	Prepare and review Bills of Quantities (BOQ), material schedules, and cost estimates.
	Measure and value construction works from drawings and site records.
	Assist in preparing project budgets, cost plans, and cash flow forecasts.
	Monitor project costs and identify cost-saving opportunities.
	Prepare interim valuations, variation orders, and final accounts.
	Verify subcontractor and supplier invoices before payment processing.
	Conduct site visits to monitor project progress and verify quantities executed.
	Maintain accurate records of project costs and contractual documentation.


Procurement Duties:


	Source and evaluate suppliers, vendors, and subcontractors.
	Obtain and analyze quotations to ensure competitive pricing and quality.
	Prepare purchase requisitions, purchase orders, and procurement reports.
	Negotiate pricing, delivery schedules, and payment terms with suppliers.
	Track material deliveries and ensure timely supply to project sites.
	Maintain supplier databases and procurement records.
	Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment of materials.
	Ensure procurement activities comply with company policies and project requirements.


Salary
N250,000 - N300,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Inetersted and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the suject "QS Officer" as the subject of the mail.

Note: Please note it is mandatory to have a procurement experience to enable you be considered for this role.    

    

        Click here to Apply

The three-star hotel is strategically located at the heart of Omole Phase 1, making it easily accessible with excellent road networks to other parts of the mainland and the city of Lagos as a whole. The 32-room Hotel offers tastefully furnished deluxe executive and super executive rooms as well as one- and two-bedroom luxury suite

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Hotel Housekeeper
Job Location: Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time&nbsp;

HRServices Consulting

Responsibilities


	Clean rooms, bathrooms, common areas [ dust, mop, disinfect]
	Change linens, restock amenities [toiletries, towel]
	Ensure hygiene standard, spotless bathrooms
	Be friendly, responsive to requests.


Requirements


	Anyone can apply, but SSCE Holder at least
	Must be 18 years and above
	Basic knowledge of cleaning chemical equipment is a plus
	Proximity to work location Ogba, Agege, Ikeja, Ojodu Berger, Akute, Ketu axis.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: careers@hotelcapitol.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Hotel Housekeeper Job at Hotel Capitol




        
    

        
        Hotel Capitol is a modern and contemporary hotel that offers not only luxury but comfort at its best. The three-star hotel is strategically located at the heart of Omole Phase 1, making it easily accessible with excellent road networks to other parts of the mainland and the city of Lagos as a whole. The 32-room Hotel offers tastefully furnished deluxe executive and super executive rooms as well as one- and two-bedroom luxury suite

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Hotel Housekeeper
Job Location: Berger, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time 
     

            
    



HRServices Consulting

Responsibilities


	Clean rooms, bathrooms, common areas [ dust, mop, disinfect]
	Change linens, restock amenities [toiletries, towel]
	Ensure hygiene standard, spotless bathrooms
	Be friendly, responsive to requests.


Requirements


	Anyone can apply, but SSCE Holder at least
	Must be 18 years and above
	Basic knowledge of cleaning chemical equipment is a plus
	Proximity to work location Ogba, Agege, Ikeja, Ojodu Berger, Akute, Ketu axis.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply
